subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. We have made mention aforetime [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم انا ذکرنا من قبل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
